products.title: The Peaceful Nights Sleep Guide
products.tagline: Help your baby sleep through the night — gently, without tears.
products.description: A complete, step-by-step PDF guide built from real parenting experience. Inside you'll find calming bedtime routines, a 7-day sleep reset plan, age-by-age schedules from newborn to toddler, and gentle techniques for night wakings. Written for tired parents who want a kind, practical path to peaceful nights.
bullets: Step-by-step bedtime routine that works in any home
7-day sleep reset plan you can start tonight
Age-by-age schedules: newborn, 3–6 months, 6–12 months, toddler
Gentle, no-cry techniques for night wakings

seo.metaTitle: The Peaceful Nights Sleep Guide — Baby & Toddler Sleep PDF
seo.metaDescription: A gentle, no-cry PDF sleep guide for tired parents. Routines, schedules, and a 7-day reset plan for babies and toddlers.
